items.title: Anthropic MCP Design Vulnerability Enables RCE, Threatening AI Supply Chain
items.summary_es: **The Hacker News** (20/04/2026): Anthropic MCP Design Vulnerability Enables RCE, Threatening AI Supply Chain. Áreas de impacto detectadas: remote code execution, rce, supply chain. Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a critical "by design" weakness in the Model Context Protocol's (MCP) architecture that could pave the way for remote code execution and h.

analisis.afectados: mencionados: Anthropic MCP Design Vulnerability Enables RCE, Threatening AI Supply Chain, Cybersecurity, Model Context Protocol
analisis.que_paso: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a critical "by design" weakness in the Model Context Protocol's (MCP) architecture that could pave the way for remote code execution and have a cascading effect on the artificial intelligence (AI) supply chain. "This flaw enables Arbitrary Command Execution (RCE) on any system
analisis.mitigacion: Parchear inmediatamente o aislar el sistema afectado. Revisar logs de acceso en busca de explotación previa.
analisis.insight_dev: Una RCE explotable puede comprometer todo el entorno de producción. Prioriza este tipo de vulnerabilidades en el backlog de seguridad.

items.title: Mirai Variant Nexcorium Exploits CVE-2024-3721 to Hijack TBK DVRs for DDoS Botnet
items.summary_es: **The Hacker News** (18/04/2026): Mirai Variant Nexcorium Exploits CVE-2024-3721 to Hijack TBK DVRs for DDoS Botnet. Áreas de impacto detectadas: exploit, cve-, vulnerability. Threat actors are exploiting security flaws in TBK DVR and end‑of‑life (EoL) TP-Link Wi-Fi routers to deploy Mirai-botnet variants on compromised devices, according to findings fro.

analisis.afectados: dispositivos IoT / red; mencionados: Mirai Variant Nexcorium Exploits CVE, Hijack TBK DVRs, DDoS Botnet, TBK DVR
analisis.que_paso: Threat actors are exploiting security flaws in TBK DVR and end‑of‑life (EoL) TP-Link Wi-Fi routers to deploy Mirai-botnet variants on compromised devices, according to findings from Fortinet FortiGuard Labs and Palo Alto Networks Unit 42. The attack targeting TBK DVR devices has been found to exploit CVE-2024-3721 (CVS
analisis.mitigacion: Revisar los boletines oficiales del proveedor y aplicar actualizaciones de seguridad disponibles. Monitorear IOCs publicados.
analisis.insight_dev: Mantenerse actualizado sobre este tipo de amenazas y revisar si los sistemas o dependencias propias están afectados.

items.title: Next.js Creator Vercel Hacked
items.summary_es: **SecurityWeek** (20/04/2026): Next.js Creator Vercel Hacked. Áreas de impacto detectadas: rce, breach. Vercel confirmed suffering a breach after a hacker claiming to be part of ShinyHunters offered to sell stolen data for $2 million. The post Next.js Creator Vercel Hacked appeared f.

analisis.afectados: mencionados: Next, Creator Vercel Hacked, Vercel, ShinyHunters
analisis.que_paso: Vercel confirmed suffering a breach after a hacker claiming to be part of ShinyHunters offered to sell stolen data for $2 million. The post Next.js Creator Vercel Hacked appeared first on SecurityWeek .
analisis.mitigacion: Parchear inmediatamente o aislar el sistema afectado. Revisar logs de acceso en busca de explotación previa.
analisis.insight_dev: Una RCE explotable puede comprometer todo el entorno de producción. Prioriza este tipo de vulnerabilidades en el backlog de seguridad.

items.title: An AI gateway designed to steal your data
items.summary_es: **Kaspersky Securelist** (26/03/2026): An AI gateway designed to steal your data. Áreas de impacto detectadas: supply chain attack, supply chain. Dissecting the supply chain attack on LiteLLM, a multifunctional gateway used in many AI agents. Explaining the dangers of the malicious code and how to protect yourself.

analisis.afectados: mencionados: An AI, Dissecting, LiteLLM, Explaining
analisis.que_paso: Why is the LiteLLM AI gateway compromise so dangerous? | Securelist Dark mode off Securelist menu English Russian Spanish Brazil Existing Customers Personal My Kaspersky Renew your product Update your product Customer support Business KSOS portal Kaspersky Business Hub Technical Support Knowledge Base Renew License Hom
analisis.mitigacion: Auditar dependencias de terceros con herramientas como Dependabot, Snyk o OWASP Dependency-Check. Fijar versiones exactas en manifiestos de dependencias.
analisis.insight_dev: Los ataques a la cadena de suministro de software son el vector de mayor crecimiento. Introduce revisión de seguridad en el proceso de aprobación de nuevas dependencias.
